nasb.text: The girl’s father shall say to the elders, ‘I gave my daughter to this man for a wife, but he turned against her;

esv.text: And the father of the young woman shall say to the elders, ‘I gave my daughter to this man to marry, and he hates her;

cnv.text: 少女的父親要對長老說：‘我把我的女兒給這人作妻子，他卻恨她，

ccb.text: 女方的父亲要对他们说，‘我把女儿嫁给这个人，现在他不喜欢我女儿，
